name: JunoTalk
description: A multilingual video call and chat app with AI assistant Juno, real-time translation, voice features, and social integrations.

name: Juno
description: JunoTalk's built-in AI assistant. Provides real-time translation, answers questions, helps with communication across languages, and guides users through features.

name: WebRTC
description: The open web standard used by JunoTalk to power real-time video and audio calls directly in the browser without plugins.

name: OpenRouter
description: AI model routing service used by JunoTalk to access multiple large language models through a single API for translation and reasoning.
